PORT_SCAN.description: Repeated connection attempts against multiple ports or hosts.

VULN_SCAN.description: Scanning activity consistent with public-service vulnerability discovery.

DNS_ENUMERATION.description: DNS query patterns indicating host, domain, or service enumeration.

WEB_CRAWLING.description: High-volume web path discovery or wordlist-style crawling.

LOGIN_BRUTE_FORCE.description: Repeated authentication failures against an exposed service.

PHISHING_EMAIL.description: Suspicious email artifact associated with credential or payload delivery.

EXPLOIT_PUBLIC_APP.description: IDS label consistent with exploitation of a public-facing application.

MALWARE_DOWNLOAD.description: Download of suspicious executable content or tooling.

SUSPICIOUS_PROCESS.description: Endpoint alert for anomalous process behavior.

POWERSHELL_ENCODED.description: Encoded or obfuscated PowerShell command alert.

SCHEDULED_TASK.description: Creation or modification of scheduled task-like execution.

PRIV_ESC_EXPLOIT.description: Alert indicating attempted local privilege escalation.

CREDENTIAL_DUMPING.description: Credential material access or dump pattern.

PASS_THE_HASH.description: Authentication pattern consistent with hash reuse.

SMB_LOGIN.description: SMB authentication or session creation event.

RDP_LOGIN.description: Remote Desktop authentication or session alert.

REMOTE_SERVICE_CREATION.description: Remote service creation or administrative service execution label.

INTERNAL_PORT_SCAN.description: East-west scanning across internal hosts or services.

NETWORK_SHARE_DISCOVERY.description: Enumeration of network shares or remote resources.

FILE_COMPRESSION.description: Compression or archiving activity frequently observed before exfiltration.

DATA_STAGING.description: Collected files staged into a temporary or unusual location.

DATABASE_DUMP.description: Bulk database export, dump, or repository extraction label.

C2_BEACONING.description: Periodic outbound callback pattern consistent with command-and-control.

EXFIL_OVER_HTTP.description: Outbound HTTP transfer pattern consistent with data exfiltration.

EXFIL_OVER_DNS.description: Suspicious DNS payload volume or tunneling-like exfiltration label.

NORMAL_TRAFFIC.description: Benign background activity or low-signal IDS label.

UNKNOWN_ALERT.description: Unrecognized alert token mapped into the model's unknown-observation bucket.
